name: Symal Group Limited
analysis: SYL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.7000, stop A$2.4948, target A$3.2365 (2.61:1) — then trail it.
